zh.Raby, Durham, England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比
zh.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾桑頓 布里奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Neville於1332年出生在英國越可爾達爾時，他的父親Ralph Neville41歲，母親Alice de Audley33歲。他於大約1356年與Elizabeth Leeds在英國越可爾吉普頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1368年在英國越可爾桑頓 布里奇享年37歲。

zh-hans.Raby, Durham, England: 英国英格兰達勒姆拉比
zh-hans.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾桑頓 布里奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Neville于1332年出生在英国越可爾達爾时，他的父亲Ralph Neville41岁，母亲Alice de Audley33岁。他于大约1356年与Elizabeth Leeds在英国越可爾吉普頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1368年在英国越可爾桑頓 布里奇享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Neville was born in 1332, in Cundall, Yorkshire, England, his father, Ralph Neville, was 41 and his mother, Alice de Audley, was 33. He married Elizabeth Leeds about 1356, in Gipton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1368, in Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Neville est né en 1332, à Cundall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice de Audley, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Leeds environ 1356, à Gipton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1368, à Thornton Bridge, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Neville 1332 in Cundall, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Neville 41 und seine Mutter Alice de Audley 33. Er hat um 1356 in Gipton, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Leeds geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1368 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Neville è nato il nel 1332 nel Cundall, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Neville, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Audley, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Leeds circa 1356, nel Gipton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1368, nel Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Nevilleが1332年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクウンダルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは41歳，母Alice de Audleyは33歳であった。約1356年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギプトンでElizabeth Leedsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1368年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルントン ブリッジで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Neville(이)가 1332년 영국 요르크실르 쿤달에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Audley(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1356년 영국 요르크실르 지프턴에서 Elizabeth Leeds(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1368년 영국 요르크실르 토른턴 브리지에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Raby, Durham, England: Raby, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Neville nasceu em 1332, em Cundall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Audley, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Leeds aproximadamente 1356, em Gipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1368, em Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Neville родился в 1332 г. в местности кундалл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Audley, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Leeds около 1356 г. в местности гиптон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1368 г. в местности таурнтон бридж, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Neville nació en 1332, en Cundall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Neville, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice de Audley, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Leeds aproximadamente 1356, en Gipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1368, en Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años.
